alternates.name: Jurong Fine Ingredients Pte Ltd
alternates.rationale: Direct equivalent E471/E414 beverage blend, FSSC 22000 like-for-like, finished-goods buffer stock on hand, and a 7-day expedited air option from Changi that beats the 9-day cover window.

alternates.name: Ingredientes Occidente S.A. de C.V.
alternates.rationale: Fastest standard lead time, but low spare capacity makes a 12 t order risky and there is no Halal/Kosher coverage for the sparkling line's export SKUs.

alternates.name: Provence Lipides SAS
alternates.rationale: Strong quality record and ideal for the Rotterdam blender geographically, but an 18-day lead time misses the 9-day cover window for the granola line.
